A:(0,0,1/2)  GM:(0,0,0)  H:(1/3,1/3,1/2)  HA:(-1/3,-1/3,-1/2)  K:(1/3,1/3,0)  KA:(-1/3,-1/3,0)  L:(1/2,0,1/2)  M:(1/2,0,0)
